basic_details.job_title: PAU Junior DTP Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Punjab Agricultural University (PAU) Recruitment 2026: Punjab Agricultural University has released the official notification for Junior DTP Assistant posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid education jobs.

age_limit.age_details: Min: 18, Max: 37 years (Relaxation up to 45 years for contract/DPL employees)
age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 37 years Age Relaxation: Up to 45 years for contract/DPL employees.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate with one year experience in page making software and DTP composing speed of 50 w.p.m. in English and 40 w.p.m in Punjabi. Matriculation with Punjabi as a language.
qualification.details: Graduate from recognized University. Minimum one year experience of practical work in page making softwares, photo-shop, corel draw etc. with DTP composing speed of 50 w.p.m. in English and 40 w.p.m in Punjabi on Computer. Matric level certificate of Punjabi language of Punjab School Education Board or any other recognized Board (as first or second language).

selection_process: Practical test for the post of Jr. DTP Asstt. (on contract basis) will be as under: a. DTP Composing speed of 50 w.p.m. in English 30 marks b. DTP Composing speed of 40 w.p.m. in Punjabi 30 marks c. Questions based on page making softwares

Corel Draw etc. 25 marks d. The minimum qualifying marks for candidates to become eligible shall be 40% of total marks in the practical test irrespective of the category. 1½ mark for each completed half year of technical experience in relevant field over and above the minimum required experience
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for PAU Junior DTP Assistant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://pau.edu/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download PAU Junior DTP Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: PAU Junior DTP Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Overview

rows.punjab_agricultural_university_pau: Graduate with one year experience in page making software and DTP composing speed of 50 w.p.m. in English and 40 w.p.m in Punjabi. Matriculation with Punjabi as a language.
Min: 18, Max: 37 years (Relaxation up to 45 years for contract/DPL employees)

content_sections.heading: PAU Junior DTP Assistant Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the PAU Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download PAU Junior DTP Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Graduate from recognized University. Minimum one year experience of practical work in page making softwares, photo-shop, corel draw etc. with DTP composing speed of 50 w.p.m. in English and 40 w.p.m in Punjabi on Computer. Matric level certificate of Punjabi language of Punjab School Education Board or any other recognized Board (as first or second language).

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 37 years Age Relaxation: Up to 45 years for contract/DPL employees.

content_sections.heading: PAU Junior DTP Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates

rows.event: Last date for submission of application

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Practical test for the post of Jr. DTP Asstt. (on contract basis) will be as under: a. DTP Composing speed of 50 w.p.m. in English 30 marks b. DTP Composing speed of 40 w.p.m. in Punjabi 30 marks c. Questions based on page making softwares, Photoshop, Corel Draw etc. 25 marks d. The minimum qualifying marks for candidates to become eligible shall be 40% of total marks in the practical test irrespective of the category. 1½ mark for each completed half year of technical experience in relevant field over and above the minimum required experience, if any will be awarded.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for PAU Junior DTP Assistant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://pau.edu/. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: PAU Junior DTP Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Junior DTP Assistant post?
faq.answer: The last date for the submission of applications for the Junior DTP Assistant post is 15th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the specified address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must be graduates from a recognized university. Additionally, they need one year of experience in page-making software and a DTP composing speed of 50 w.p.m. in English and 40 w.p.m. in Punjabi. Matriculation with Punjabi as a language is also mandatory.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Junior DTP Assistant position?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit is 18 years, and the maximum age limit is 37 years. Age relaxation is provided for contract/DPL employees, up to 45 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior DTP Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a fixed salary of Rs. 12506/- plus Rs. 800/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the Junior DTP Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. You need to download the application form, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it via post to the given address before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee for all categories is Rs. 150/-. This fee should be submitted in the form of a Bank Draft.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Junior DTP Assistant post?
faq.answer: The selection will be based on a practical test that includes DTP composing speed in English and Punjabi, and questions related to page-making software. Experience will also be considered.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent or contract job?
faq.answer: This is a contract-based job opportunity at Punjab Agricultural University.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of Punjab Agricultural University, which is https://pau.edu/.

faq.question: Q10. What is the total number of vacancies announced?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy announced for the post of Junior DTP Assistant in this recruitment drive.
